assets.name: lecture_03_frame_01.png
assets.rationale: Captures key angular-momentum structure: m values for each L and the L(L+1) relation, foundational for notation used in notes.

assets.name: lecture_03_frame_02.png
assets.rationale: Shows the centrifugal barrier argument and the special l=0 exception, useful for effective radial-potential discussion.

assets.name: lecture_03_frame_03.png
assets.rationale: Contains the algebra turning angular-momentum square into a radial term l(l+1)/r^2, central to the corrected radial equation.

assets.name: lecture_03_frame_04.png
assets.rationale: Board appears to lay out l=0,1,2,3 and progression, useful as a spectrum/organization diagram for atomic states.

assets.name: lecture_03_frame_05.png
assets.rationale: Gives original Schrödinger form and p^2 decomposition, important reference before converting to radial/angular-separated form.
